name: Kulikuli (Peanut Balls)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Peanut oil, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind or pound the peanuts, adding just enough oil to make a smooth paste.
2. With wet hands, squeeze the mixture to remove any excess oil.
3. Saute the onions, cayenne, and salt in a tablespoon of oil until golden.
4. Knead the sauteed mixture into the peanut paste.
5. Shape the mixture into 1-inch diameter balls, adding a few drops of water if necessary to help them hold together.
6. Drop the balls into hot oil or flatten them and fry in a skillet.
7. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes until the outside is crisp.
